task_completion.description: Verify that the document title and required H1/H2 headings are correctly formatted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sections 'Audit Scope', 'Methodology', 'Executive Summary', 'Detailed Findings', and 'CAPA Log' should be styled as Heading 1 (larger, prominent). The subsections 'Clause 7.1.5', 'Clause 7.5', 'Clause 8.4', 'Clause 8.5.2', and 'Clause 9.3' should be styled as Heading 2.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'MAJOR' findings are styled correctly according to the rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Any text indicating a 'MAJOR' finding must be styled in both Red text color and Bold font weight.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'MINOR' findings are styled correctly according to the rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Any text indicating a 'MINOR' finding must be styled in Bold font weight, but NOT red.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified clause references are italicized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text for 'Clause 7.1.5', 'Clause 7.5', 'Clause 8.4', 'Clause 8.5.2', and 'Clause 9.3' should appear in italics wherever referenced.

task_completion.description: Verify that the pipe-delimited CAPA log has been converted into a 4-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A structured 4-column table is visible under the 'CAPA Log' section, completely replacing the raw pipe-delimited text.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Table of Contents is inserted in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated Table of Contents block is visible immediately following the 'Executive Summary' section and before the 'Detailed Findings' section.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a word processor GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a word processor application (like LibreOffice Writer) with formatting toolbars visible, rather than being manipulated blindly via terminal scripts or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the table was created using the word processor's native table feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CAPA log table should have visible cell borders or gridlines typical of a native word processor table, not just text manually aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Verify the Table of Contents was generated using the built-in TOC feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC should have a distinct structural block appearance (often with a grey background field or dotted leader lines) typical of an auto-generated TOC, rather than manually typed text.
